page_metadata.biotools__summary: CorGAT is a tool for the functional annotation of SARS-CoV-2 genomes. It is a collection of Perl script for the alignment of SARS-CoV-2 genomes and the functional annotation of genetic variants.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CorGAT is a tool for the functional annotation of SARS-CoV-2 genomes. It is a collection of Perl script for the alignment of SARS-CoV-2 genomes and the functional annotation of genetic variants.
